---
title: "Cookie Policy"
---

*Last updated: 2025*

## What Are Cookies

Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help
the site function properly and provide basic analytics.

## Cookies We Use

This website may use essential cookies to ensure basic functionality. We do not use
cookies for advertising or tracking purposes.

## Managing Cookies

You can control and delete cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may
affect some site functionality.

## Contact

For questions about this policy, contact us at jane@pinestrwadistributors.com.
